name: Arch Update (rael2pac)
author: Ast
description: A plugin to manage updates on Arch

defaultSettings.updateCmd:
kitty -e bash -c '
R="\033[0;31m" G="\033[0;32m" Y="\033[1;33m" C="\033[0;36m" B="\033[1;34m" M="\033[1;35m" N="\033[0m"
re_pkg="^([^ ]+)[[:space:]]([^ ]+)[[:space:]]->[[:space:]]([^ ]+)$"

echo -e "${B}📦 ATUALIZANDO O SISTEMA${N}"
echo ==========================================

PACMAN_PRE=$(checkupdates 2>/dev/null || true)
AUR_PRE=$(yay -Qua 2>/dev/null || true)

echo -e "${Y}-> INICIANDO AS ATUALIZAÇÕES${N}"
yay -Syu --noconfirm 2>&1
echo

echo -e "${C}-> Flatpaks${N}"
flatpak update -y 2>&1 || echo "Flatpak nao encontrado, pulando..."
echo

echo -e "${Y}🧹 LIMPEZA DO SISTEMA${N}"
echo ==========================================

echo -e "${Y}• Cache pacman (paccache -k 3)...${N}"
PAC_LOG=$(paccache -r -k 3 2>&1)
echo "$PAC_LOG"
echo

echo -e "${Y}• Cache AUR (yay -Sc)...${N}"
AUR_LOG=$(yes | yay -Sc 2>&1)
echo "$AUR_LOG" | grep -v "^$" | tail -20
echo

echo -e "${Y}• Builds AUR nao usados (yay -Yc)...${N}"
BUILD_LOG=$(yes | yay -Yc 2>&1)
echo "$BUILD_LOG" | grep -v "^$" | tail -20
echo

echo -e "${Y}• Orfaos...${N}"
ORPHAN_LIST=$(pacman -Qdtq 2>/dev/null)
if [ -n "$ORPHAN_LIST" ]; then
    echo "$ORPHAN_LIST"
    ORPHAN_LOG=$(sudo pacman -Rns $ORPHAN_LIST --noconfirm 2>&1)
    echo "$ORPHAN_LOG"
else
    ORPHAN_LOG="Nenhum pacote orfao encontrado"
    echo "$ORPHAN_LOG"
fi
echo

echo -e "${Y}• Flatpaks nao usados...${N}"
FLATPAK_LOG=$(flatpak uninstall --unused --delete-data -y 2>&1 || echo "Flatpak nao encontrado, pulando...")
echo "$FLATPAK_LOG"
echo

echo -e "${Y}• Logs (journalctl 7d)...${N}"
JOURNAL_LOG=$(journalctl --vacuum-time=7d 2>&1)
echo "$JOURNAL_LOG"
echo

echo -e "${Y}• Cache do usuario...${N}"
EXCLUDE_DIRS="! -name noctalia ! -name noctalia-qs ! -name fontconfig ! -name dolphin ! -name wofi-drun ! -name thumbnails ! -name lutris ! -name ZapZap ! -name swww ! -name yay"
CACHE_ITEMS=$(find ~/.cache -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 $EXCLUDE_DIRS -exec du -sh {} + 2>/dev/null | sort -rh)
USER_CACHE_BEFORE=$(du -sh ~/.cache 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)
if [ -n "$CACHE_ITEMS" ]; then
    echo "Itens removidos:"
    echo "$CACHE_ITEMS"
    echo ""
fi
find ~/.cache -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 $EXCLUDE_DIRS -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null || true
USER_CACHE_AFTER=$(du -sh ~/.cache 2>/dev/null | cut -f1)
echo "Tamanho: $USER_CACHE_BEFORE → $USER_CACHE_AFTER"
echo

echo ==========================================
echo -e "${G}✅ Sistema atualizado com sucesso!${N}"
echo ==========================================
echo ""

echo "========================================="
echo -e "${C}📋 LOG DE PACOTES ATUALIZADOS${N}"
echo "========================================="
if [ -n "$PACMAN_PRE" ]; then
    echo -e "${Y}--- Pacman ---${N}"
    echo "$PACMAN_PRE" | while IFS= read -r line; do
        if [[ "$line" =~ $re_pkg ]]; then
            echo -e "${C}${BASH_REMATCH[1]}${N} ${R}${BASH_REMATCH[2]}${N} ${Y}->${N} ${G}${BASH_REMATCH[3]}${N}"
        else
            echo "$line"
        fi
    done
else
    echo -e "${Y}Nenhuma atualizacao pendente${N} (Pacman)"
fi
if [ -n "$AUR_PRE" ]; then
    echo ""
    echo -e "${M}--- AUR ---${N}"
    echo "$AUR_PRE" | while IFS= read -r line; do
        if [[ "$line" =~ $re_pkg ]]; then
            echo -e "${C}${BASH_REMATCH[1]}${N} ${R}${BASH_REMATCH[2]}${N} ${Y}->${N} ${G}${BASH_REMATCH[3]}${N}"
        else
            echo "$line"
        fi
    done
else
    echo -e "${Y}Nenhuma atualizacao pendente${N} (AUR)"
fi
echo ""

echo "========================================="
echo -e "${C}📋 LOG DE LIMPEZA${N}"
echo "========================================="

echo -e "${Y}• Cache pacman:${N}"
PAC_CLEANED=$(echo "$PAC_LOG" | grep -iE "(remov|liberado|freed|total|pruned)" | head -5)
if [ -n "$PAC_CLEANED" ]; then
    echo "$PAC_CLEANED" | while IFS= read -r line; do echo -e "${G}$line${N}"; done
else
    echo -e "${Y}$(echo "$PAC_LOG" | tail -3)${N}"
fi
echo ""

echo -e "${Y}• Cache AUR:${N}"
echo "$AUR_LOG" | grep -ivE "(^$|Deseja|Diretório|Pacotes a|Todos os)" | tail -15 | while IFS= read -r line; do
    if [[ "$line" =~ ^Removing ]]; then
        echo -e "${Y}$line${N}"
    else
        echo "$line"
    fi
done
echo ""

echo -e "${Y}• Builds AUR removidos:${N}"
BUILD_REMOVED=$(echo "$BUILD_LOG" | grep -E "(removendo|Pacotes|Tamanho|Nada)" | head -10)
if [ -n "$BUILD_REMOVED" ]; then
    echo "$BUILD_REMOVED" | while IFS= read -r line; do
        if [[ "$line" =~ Tamanho ]]; then
            echo -e "${G}$line${N}"
        elif [[ "$line" =~ ^Pacotes ]]; then
            echo -e "${M}$line${N}"
        elif [[ "$line" =~ ^removendo ]]; then
            echo -e "${Y}$line${N}"
        else
            echo "$line"
        fi
    done
else
    echo -e "${Y}Nada removido${N}"
fi
echo ""

echo -e "${Y}• Orfaos:${N}"
if [ -n "$ORPHAN_LIST" ]; then
    echo "$ORPHAN_LIST" | while IFS= read -r line; do echo -e "${C}$line${N}"; done
    echo "$ORPHAN_LOG" | grep -iE "(removendo|total)" | head -5 | while IFS= read -r line; do
        if [[ "$line" =~ Tamanho ]]; then
            echo -e "${G}$line${N}"
        else
            echo -e "${Y}$line${N}"
        fi
    done
else
    echo -e "${Y}$ORPHAN_LOG${N}"
fi
echo ""

echo -e "${Y}• Flatpaks:${N}"
echo "$FLATPAK_LOG" | grep -v "^$" | while IFS= read -r line; do
    if [[ "$line" =~ nao\ encontrado ]]; then
        echo -e "${Y}$line${N}"
    else
        echo "$line"
    fi
done
echo ""

echo -e "${Y}• Logs:${N}"
echo "$JOURNAL_LOG" | while IFS= read -r line; do
    if [[ "$line" =~ freed ]]; then
        echo -e "${G}$line${N}"
    elif [[ "$line" =~ Vacuuming ]]; then
        echo -e "${Y}$line${N}"
    else
        echo "$line"
    fi
done
echo ""

echo -e "${Y}• Cache do usuario:${N}"
echo -e "${C}$USER_CACHE_BEFORE${N} ${Y}→${N} ${C}$USER_CACHE_AFTER${N}"
if [ -n "$CACHE_ITEMS" ]; then
    echo ""
    echo -e "${M}Itens removidos:${N}"
    echo "$CACHE_ITEMS" | while IFS= read -r line; do
        size="${line%%[[:space:]]*}"
        rest="${line#*[[:space:]]}"
        echo -e "${Y}$size${N}$rest"
    done
fi
echo ""

echo "========================================="
read -p "Pressione Enter para fechar..."
'
defaultSettings.cleanupCmd: paccache -r -k 3 2>/dev/null; yay -Sc --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; yay -Yc --noconfirm 2>/dev/null; orphans=$(pacman -Qdtq 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$orphans" ] && sudo pacman -Rns $orphans --noconfirm 2>/dev/null || true; flatpak uninstall --unused --delete-data -y 2>/dev/null; journalctl --vacuum-time=7d 2>/dev/null
defaultSettings.cachePreserveList: noctalia noctalia-qs fontconfig dolphin wofi-drun thumbnails lutris ZapZap swww yay
